- Symptoms: depressed mood, loss of interest, fatigue, changes in appetite, sleep disturbances, feelings of worthlessness, difficulty concentrating, recurrent thoughts of death.

Generalized Anxiety Disorder (GAD):
- Symptoms: excessive worry about various matters, muscle tension, restlessness, fatigue, difficulty concentrating, irritability, sleep disturbances.
- Treatments: selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors (SSRIs), benzodiazepines, CBT, mindfulness-based stress reduction.

- Symptoms: intense fear of social situations, fear of scrutiny, avoidance of social interactions, blushing, trembling, sweating.

- Symptoms: depressed mood, low energy, oversleeping, increased appetite, carbohydrate cravings, social withdrawal.
- Treatments: light therapy, antidepressants, CBT, lifestyle changes.

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT DISTINCT STR(YEAR(?horrorRelease)) AS ?releaseYear

  ?film wdt:P31 wd:Q11424;
         wdt:P577 ?releaseDate;
         wdt:P2142 ?boxOffice;
         wdt:P272 ?studio.

             wdt:P136 wd:Q43919;
             wdt:P577 ?horrorRelease.
